title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to help teachers introduce AI and machine learning fundamentals to school-aged students. The program uses research-backed pedagogies to support responsible and ethical AI learning and has reached over 165 countries.
